name: odata-gateway-bq
description: This project was bootstrapped with Fastify-CLI.

scripts.test: npm run build:backend && tsc -p backend/test/tsconfig.json && cross-env OIDC_ISSUER=http://localhost/ OIDC_AUDIENCE=test-audience BQ_BILLING_PROJECT_ID=test-project GCP_WORKLOAD_POOL_ID=test-project GCP_WORKLOAD_PROVIDER_ID=test-provider FASTIFY_AUTOLOAD_TYPESCRIPT=1 node --test --test-concurrency 1 --import tsx backend/test/**/*.test.ts
scripts.start: npm run build:backend && fastify start -a 0.0.0.0 -l info backend/dist/app.js
scripts.dev:backend: npm run build:backend && fastify start -a 0.0.0.0 --ignore-watch=.ts$ -w -l info -P backend/dist/app.js --port 3001

author: Amine MOKHTARI
